zh.homeIntro1: 庇护神父（Padre Pio，1887年5月25日—1968年9月23日），本名弗朗切斯科·福尔焦内，是意大利嘉布遣会方济各会修士。1918年9月20日，他在圣乔瓦尼·罗通多修道院祈祷时出现了圣伤（stigmata），双手、双脚和肋部出现与基督受难相同的伤口，持续长达50年。
zh.homeIntro2: 除圣伤外，庇护神父还以双重定位（bilocation）、读心术、治愈奇迹和预言能力闻名。他在书信和与信徒的对话中留下了多条关于未来的预言性陈述，涉及教会命运、世界局势和人类道德走向。2002年6月16日，教宗若望保禄二世将其封为圣人。
zh.homeIntro3: 庇护神父最著名的预言包括「三日黑暗」末世预言、对二战走向的预测，以及关于未来教宗和教会命运的警示。本站收录了其14条可追溯的预言性陈述，并对已到期的预言进行了验证分析。
zh.coreQuote: 「祈祷，抱有希望，不要忧虑。忧虑毫无用处。天主是仁慈的，会聆听你的祈祷。」
keyPointsList: 1918年 —— 在修道院祈祷时首次出现圣伤，开始预言活动
1940年代 —— 预言二战走向及意大利命运
1947年 —— 年轻的卡罗尔·沃伊蒂瓦来访，庇护预言他将成为教宗
1959年 —— 关于教会未来和道德衰退的系列警示
1968年 —— 去世前最后的预言，关于三日黑暗和末世净化
sourceList: 预言内容整理自庇护神父的书信集、灵修指导记录和信徒证词（Wikipedia）
部分预言来自传记作品和教会档案（Padre Pio Devotions）
验证评价基于公开历史记录和教会文献
编者观点不代表天主教会官方立场
站点图标采用方济各会 Tau 十字架——嘉布遣会源自方济各会，Tau 十字是圣方济各最重要的标志

en.homeIntro1: Padre Pio (May 25, 1887 – September 23, 1968), born Francesco Forgione, was an Italian Capuchin Franciscan friar. On September 20, 1918, while praying at the monastery in San Giovanni Rotondo, he received the stigmata — wounds on his hands, feet, and side matching those of Christ's crucifixion — which persisted for 50 years.
en.homeIntro2: Beyond the stigmata, Padre Pio was renowned for bilocation, reading hearts, miraculous healings, and prophetic abilities. Through his letters and conversations with the faithful, he left numerous prophetic statements concerning the Church's destiny, world affairs, and humanity's moral trajectory. He was canonized by Pope John Paul II on June 16, 2002.
en.homeIntro3: Padre Pio's most famous prophecies include the 'Three Days of Darkness' eschatological vision, predictions about WWII, and warnings about future popes and the fate of the Church. This archive compiles 14 traceable prophetic statements and evaluates those whose deadlines have passed.
en.coreQuote: "Pray, hope, and don't worry. Worry is useless. God is merciful and will hear your prayer."
keyPointsList: 1918 —— First received the stigmata during prayer, began prophetic activity
1940s —— Predicted the course of WWII and Italy's fate
1947 —— Young Karol Wojtyla visited; Padre Pio prophesied he would become Pope
1959 —— Series of warnings about the Church's future and moral decline
1968 —— Final prophecies before death, concerning Three Days of Darkness and eschatological purification
sourceList: Prophecies compiled from Padre Pio's collected letters, spiritual direction records, and testimonies of the faithful (Wikipedia)
Some prophecies sourced from biographical works and Church archives (Padre Pio Devotions)
Verification based on public historical records and Church documents
Editorial opinions do not represent the official position of the Catholic Church
Site icon: Franciscan Tau cross — the Capuchin Order is a branch of the Franciscans, and the Tau cross is St. Francis's most important symbol
